'''thanguthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeitgeistification|zeitgeistification]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeitgeistification|zeitgeistification]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thanguthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thængithith|thængithith]] || [[word:thængithij|thængithij]] || [[word:thængithish|thængithish]] || [[word:thængithi|thængithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thangunguthuth|thangunguthuth]] || [[word:thangunguthuj|thangunguthuj]] || [[word:thangunguthush|thangunguthush]] || [[word:thangunguthu|thangunguthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanguthuth|thanguthuth]] || [[word:thanguthuj|thanguthuj]] || [[word:thanguthush|thanguthush]] || [[word:thanguthu|thanguthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangufthuth|thangufthuth]] || [[word:thangufthuj|thangufthuj]] || [[word:thangufthush|thangufthush]] || [[word:thangufthuf|thangufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thanguthuthu|thanguthuthu]] || [[word:thanguthuju|thanguthuju]] || [[word:thanguthushu|thanguthushu]] || [[word:thanguthuku|thanguthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thanguthuth|thanguthuth]] || [[word:thanguthuj|thanguthuj]] || [[word:thanguthush|thanguthush]] || [[word:thanguthu|thanguthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thanguthuthul|thanguthuthul]] || [[word:thanguthujul|thanguthujul]] || [[word:thanguthushul|thanguthushul]] || [[word:thanguthukul|thanguthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thanguthuthuthu|thanguthuthuthu]] || [[word:thanguthujuju|thanguthujuju]] || [[word:thanguthushushu|thanguthushushu]] || [[word:thanguthuku|thanguthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thanguthuthun|thanguthuthun]] || [[word:thanguthujun|thanguthujun]] || [[word:thanguthushun|thanguthushun]] || [[word:thanguthukun|thanguthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thanguthuthuoro|thanguthuthuoro]] || [[word:thanguthujuoro|thanguthujuoro]] || [[word:thanguthushuoro|thanguthushuoro]] || [[word:thanguthukuoro|thanguthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
